scripts.dev: curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python3 && python3 -m pip install -r requirements-web.txt && python3 -m streamlit run web_hub/app.py --server.port 3000 --server.address 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python3 && python3 -m pip install -r requirements-web.txt
